name: Bratwurst
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the casings.
2. Grind the pork through the fine blade of the grinder.
3. Mix the ground pork with the veal and grind again.
4. Add the remaining ingredients (pork fat, allspice, caraway seeds, marjoram, pepper, and salt) to the meat mixture and mix thoroughly.
5. Stuff the mixture into the casings and twist off into four- or five-inch lengths.
6. Refrigerate for up to two days. The bratwurst can be pan fried or grilled over charcoal.
